title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : les horaires d'ouverture
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: What are the opening hours of the staff cafeteria? (A) It's open from seven in the morning until three in the afternoon. (B) The cafeteria is on the ground floor. (C) I usually have a salad for lunch.

choices: It's open from seven in the morning until three in the afternoon.
The cafeteria is on the ground floor.
I usually have a salad for lunch.
questions.explanation: "What are the opening hours?" demande des horaires. (A) les donne précisément. (B) répond à "Where", (C) décrit une habitude alimentaire.
